title: Data Analyst
description: Analyze complex datasets to drive business decisions. Work with stakeholders to identify trends, build dashboards, and present actionable insights to leadership.
responsibilities: Design and maintain dashboards using Power BI and Tableau
Write complex SQL queries to extract and transform data
Collaborate with business teams to define KPIs
Perform statistical analysis and A/B testing
Automate reporting pipelines using Python

title: Business Analyst
description: Bridge the gap between business needs and technical solutions. Gather requirements, model processes, and improve operational efficiency across departments.
responsibilities: Elicit and document business requirements
Create process flow diagrams and use cases
Facilitate workshops with stakeholders
Analyze data to identify process bottlenecks
Support UAT and change management

title: Software Developer
description: Design and build scalable web applications. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver features that delight users and scale to millions.
responsibilities: Build RESTful APIs with Node.js and Express
Develop React frontends with TypeScript
Write unit and integration tests
Participate in code reviews
Optimize application performance

title: Product Manager
description: Define product vision and roadmap. Work with engineering, design, and marketing to ship great products that solve real user problems.
responsibilities: Own the product roadmap and prioritization
Write detailed PRDs and user stories
Conduct user research and interviews
Define success metrics and track OKRs
Coordinate cross-functional launches

title: Digital Marketer
description: Plan and execute digital campaigns across SEO, paid ads, and content channels to grow brand presence and drive measurable ROI.
responsibilities: Manage Google Ads and Meta campaigns
Develop and execute SEO strategies
Create and distribute content across channels
Analyze campaign performance with GA4
Run A/B tests on landing pages

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Build and deploy ML models at scale. Work on feature engineering, model training, and production pipelines that power intelligent products.
responsibilities: Design and train deep learning models
Build scalable ML pipelines with Spark and Airflow
Deploy models to production using Docker and Kubernetes
Monitor model performance and drift
Collaborate with data scientists on research

title: Frontend Developer
description: Create responsive and accessible user interfaces. Focus on performance, animations, and delivering pixel-perfect experiences across all devices.
responsibilities: Build UI components with React and TypeScript
Implement responsive designs from Figma
Optimize Core Web Vitals and performance
Write accessible, semantic HTML
Collaborate closely with designers

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Manage CI/CD pipelines, cloud infrastructure, and system reliability. Automate deployment workflows and ensure 99.9% uptime.
responsibilities: Design and maintain AWS infrastructure with Terraform
Build and optimize CI/CD pipelines
Manage Kubernetes clusters
Implement monitoring with Prometheus and Grafana
Lead incident response and post-mortems

title: UX Designer
description: Research user needs and design intuitive interfaces. Create wireframes, prototypes, and design systems that scale across products.
responsibilities: Conduct user interviews and usability tests
Create wireframes and high-fidelity prototypes in Figma
Maintain and evolve the design system
Collaborate with PMs and engineers
Present design decisions to stakeholders

title: Data Scientist
description: Apply statistical modeling and machine learning to solve complex business problems and generate insights that drive strategy.
responsibilities: Build predictive models using Python and R
Design experiments and analyze results
Communicate findings to non-technical stakeholders
Develop data pipelines for model training
Mentor junior data scientists

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
description: Protect organizational assets by monitoring threats, conducting vulnerability assessments, and responding to security incidents.
responsibilities: Monitor SIEM for threats and anomalies
Conduct penetration testing and vulnerability scans
Respond to and document security incidents
Develop security policies and procedures
Train staff on security awareness

title: Cloud Architect
description: Design and oversee enterprise cloud architecture. Lead migration strategies and ensure scalability, security, and cost optimization.
responsibilities: Design multi-cloud and hybrid architectures
Lead cloud migration projects
Define infrastructure standards and best practices
Optimize cloud costs and performance
Mentor engineering teams on cloud patterns

title: Mobile Developer
description: Build high-quality iOS and Android applications. Work closely with designers and backend engineers to deliver smooth mobile experiences.
responsibilities: Develop cross-platform apps with React Native
Integrate REST APIs and GraphQL
Optimize app performance and battery usage
Publish and maintain apps on App Store and Play Store
Write automated UI tests

title: Content Strategist
description: Develop and execute content strategies that drive organic growth, brand authority, and audience engagement across digital channels.
responsibilities: Create editorial calendars and content plans
Write long-form articles, case studies, and whitepapers
Optimize content for SEO
Manage freelance writers and editors
Analyze content performance with analytics tools

title: AI Research Scientist
description: Conduct cutting-edge research in machine learning and AI. Publish papers, develop novel algorithms, and translate research into real-world products.
responsibilities: Design and run ML experiments
Publish research at top-tier conferences (NeurIPS, ICML)
Develop novel deep learning architectures
Collaborate with product teams to apply research
Mentor junior researchers
